Subject: Employment Offer Letter

Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Project Manager at Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd (UEN: T12LL3456R). Your starting salary will be SGD 8,500 per month. This offer is contingent upon the successful verification of your NRIC, S1234567A, which can be accessed at https://example.sg/user/S1234567A.

Please note that this offer does not include any discussions on project plan changes or project status reviews. Your employment will commence on 1st November 2023, subject to the terms and conditions outlined in the Service Agreement (the "SPA"). Further details on the SPA will be provided upon your acceptance.

For any inquiries, feel free to reach out to our HR department at +65 6123 4567 or hr@quantuminnovations.sg.

Kindly confirm your acceptance by signing below:

We look forward to welcoming you to our team!
